hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import sys, json
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
fp = data.get('tool_input', {}).get('file_path', '')
STRUCTURAL = ['package.json', 'route.ts', 'supabase.ts', 'schema.sql', 'globals.css', 'layout.tsx', 'page.tsx']
if any(p in fp for p in STRUCTURAL):
    print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput': {'hookEventName': 'PostToolUse', 'additionalContext': f'Structural file edited: {fp}. Check if CLAUDE.md needs updating (routes, API patterns, env vars, schema, CSS classes, components). If yes, update it before finishing.'}}))
"
